column1: # Strong's equivalence table — closes the OSHB(UHB) ↔ crosswalk assignment gap.
# When UHB and the OpenHebrewBible 002 crosswalk tag the same word with
# different Strong's numbers, list (variant -> canonical) here. spine/reconcile.py
# applies these to BOTH sequences before comparing, so direction only needs to be
# consistent. Entries below are the high-frequency cases from the full-OT
# Strong's variant/homograph pairs. A lexicon spot-check is still advisable.

column3: REVIEW — chayil vs chel: possibly distinct words, not equivalent
